text: 4594 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْمُتْعَةِ أَ هِيَ مِنَ اَلْأَرْبَعِ قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ مِنَ اَلسَّبْعِينَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4594 - Hammad narrated from Abu Basir, who said:
Abu Abdillah (as) was asked about Mutah (temporary marriage) - whether it is counted as part of the four [wives].
Imam (as) said: "No, and not even among seventy."
